name: Facilities
description: An infrastructure mini-expansion for Twilight Imperium 4th Edition
overview:
Structures are divided into basic and advanced facilities. You may have up to 2 basic and up to 1 advanced facilities on a planet.
Note: PDS are basic and Space Docks are advanced facilities.

blocks.content:
Structures are divided into basic and advanced facilities. You may have up to 2 basic and up to 1 advanced facilities on a planet.
Note: PDS are basic and Space Docks are advanced facilities.
Player sheets for each faction, top and bottom, are available for Facilities players.
And there are 10 units for each player.
Blue Reveries supports a set of faction facilities.

Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Garrison.jpg.description:
***DEPLOY:*** When you place infantry on a planet you control, you may place this unit on that planet.
When an infantry unit on this planet would be destroyed, you may have one of your structures on this planet become damaged instead,
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Garrison.jpg.subtitle: Basic Facility
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Garrison.jpg.title: Garrison

Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Laboratory.jpg.description: The first time you gain a technology this turn, gain 1 trade good. Then, ready this planet if it has a technology speciality.
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Laboratory.jpg.subtitle: Basic Facility
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Laboratory.jpg.title: Laboratory

Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Logistics Hub.jpg.description:
While this planet is adjacent to a neighbor's planet that contains a structure, increase your commodity value by 1.
You can resolve transactions with players who control a logistics hub on planets that share a planetary trait with this planet.
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Logistics Hub.jpg.subtitle: Advanced Facility
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Logistics Hub.jpg.title: Logistics Hub

Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Refinery.jpg.description: This planet's resource value is increased by 1.
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Refinery.jpg.subtitle: Basic Facility
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Refinery.jpg.title: Refinery

Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Transit Network.j.description: During movement, you may exhaust this planet to apply +1 to the move value of 1 ship in a system that contains your structures.
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Transit Network.j.subtitle: Advanced Facility
Cards/Unit Cards/Basic Transit Network.j.title: Transit Network
